 +   └─ aws:s3:Bucket            completed-bucket       created

  aws:ec2:Instance (interrupted-instance):
    + aws:ec2/instance:Instance: (create)
        [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::aws:ec2/instance:Instance::interrupted-instance]
        ami         : "ami-12345678"
        instanceType: "t3.micro"

      ~ instanceClass: "db.t3.micro" => "db.t3.small"

        arn: "arn:aws:s3:::completed-bucket-1234567"
